name: Crockpot Vichyssoise
recipeIngredient: 4 Leeks, sliced (use White and Lightest green parts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the last three in the cooker.
2. Cook on high for 3 hours.
3. Puree the mixture in a blender or food mill and return it to the cooker.
4. Add milk and cream, stir well, and heat to boiling (about 1 hour on high).
5. Chill.
6. Serve with chives.
